retrieved_result: Billing for ALS Assessments Billing for ALS Assessments Often misunderstood EMS billing is a science all of its own. One of the often misunderstood topics is when and how to properly bill for an ALS Assessment. Today’s blog serves to educate our clients and friends who read this space regarding when and how to bill for an ALS
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses EMS billing and ALS assessments, not database queries or optimization strategies.
